MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DOUGLAS CAMERON MCLELLAN OF KAPLAN & SAM, TEL. NO. 447-8300 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ROBERT CARR'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER OF DEFENDANT ANN MONRAD TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 3(e)&(g); SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE 3(f). SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS TO ANSWER AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE 3(i)(3). SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 3(i) (1) AND (2). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J.
